_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Skill in conducting data consumer discovery, translating consumer data needs into data product requirements with defined quality, freshness, and access standards.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI DQ domain. DQ-S-007 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-K-004 (SP, cosine: 0.528), DQ-K-021 (DQ, cosine: 0.506).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.8/10 (raw 0.581). Shared vocabulary: [needs]. DCWF-only terms [customer, information, knowledge] vs WIDAI-only terms [access, conducting, consumer, data, defined, discovery] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.890 (P=0.921, R=0.862). P exceeds R by 0.059 — the DCWF element's 5 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 21 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Knowledge of customer information needs." and "Skill in conducting data consumer discovery, translating consumer data needs int" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.531 ≈ STS 0.581 (gap 0.049). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [needs] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 4.5%. Shared tokens: [needs]. DCWF-only: [customer, information, knowledge]. WIDAI-only: [access, conducting, consumer, data, defined, discovery].
